attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
WSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
WSO.BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
WSO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
WSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT, 
WSO.START_TV_DATETIME, 
WSO.START_SSP_DATE,
WSO.END_TV_DATETIME, 
WSO.END_SSP_DATE, 
WSO.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,
WSO.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE, 
WSO.PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,
WSO.ORDER_DATETIME, 
WSO.ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME,
WSO.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE, 
WSO.INVOICING_DEFERRAL_EXPIR_DTM,
WSO.EARLY_SHIP_ALLOWED_FLAG, 
WSO.PARTIAL_SHIPMENT_ALLOWED_FLAG,
WSO.SALES_ORDER_OPEN_FLAG, 
WSO.CUSTOMER_SERVICE_REP_NAME,
WSO.PURCHASE_ORDER_DATE,
WSO.FAX_RECEIVED_DATETIME, 
WSO.COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE,
WSO.SALES_ORDER_EXPIRATION_DTM, 
WSO.CUST_SVC_REP_TEAM_NAME,
WSO.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
WSO.ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_REFERENCE_CODE, 
WSO.SUBMITTED_ON_WEB_BY_NAME,
WSO.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME, 
WSO.BK_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE, WSO.BK_DEAL_ID,
WSO.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME, WSO.BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME, 
WSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
WSO.BK_FOB_POINT_CODE, 
WSO.BK_FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE,
WSO.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
WSO.BK_SO_SRC_UPD_DATETIME,
WSO.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, 
WSO.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE,
WSO.CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_ROLE, 
WSO.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
WSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT, 
WSO.SS_CODE, WSO.CANCELLED_FLAG,
WSO.PRICING_DATETIME, 
WSO.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
WSO.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
WSO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
WSO.RU_BK_ORIG_SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
WSO.EDW_CREATE_USER,
WSO.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
WSO.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
WSO.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
WSO.ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD,
WSO.SO_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
WSO.SO_MODIFIED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
WSO.MIGRATION_TRX_SRC_CD,
WSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,
WSO.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT,
WSO.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID,
WSO.ORDER_SOURCE_APPLCTN_NAME,
WSO.ACCOUNT_TYPE_CD,
WSO.BILL_TO_PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
FROM $$WORKDB.W_SALES_ORDER WSO
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT
                     WHERE NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = WSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
